name: Random Float
description: Generates a random float between min and max.
python_code:
import random
async def execute(self, inputs):
    mn_val = inputs.get('min')
    mx_val = inputs.get('max')
    
    mn = float(mn_val) if mn_val is not None else 0.0
    mx = float(mx_val) if mx_val is not None else 1.0
    
    res = random.uniform(mn, mx)
    await self.set_output('value', res)
    await self.set_output("exec_out", True)
    return {'value': res}
